    · have : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
        rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff]
        · constructor
          · simp only [Int.cast_ofNat, sub_pos]
            rw [Real.lt_sqrt (by norm_num)]
            norm_num
          · rw [Real.sqrt_le_iff]
            constructor
            · norm_num
            · norm_num
        · norm_num
      simp [this]
    · rw [show (50 : ℝ) = 2 * 25 by norm_num, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by norm_num)]
      · push_neg
        intro h
        have := irrational_sqrt_two.mul_rat (by norm_num : (5 : ℚ) ≠ 0)
        simp only [Rat.cast_ofNat] at this
        rw [Real.sqrt_two_mul_self, mul_comm] at h
        exact this ⟨_, h.symm⟩
      · exact Real.sqrt_nonneg _
      · norm_num
  have h4 : f (9 / 2) = 4 := by
    rw [h₀]
    · norm_num
    · exact not_irrational_rat (9 / 2)
  linarith

simp only [h50] at h
      have : Real.sqrt 2 = h / 5 := by linarith
      exact irrational_sqrt_two ⟨h / 5, this.symm⟩
    · exact Real.sqrt_nonneg _
  rw [h₀ _ hrat1, h₀ _ hrat2, h₁ _ hirr1, h₁ _ hirr2]
  rw [hcbrt]
  have hfl1 : (⌊(2 : ℝ)⌋ : ℤ) = 2 := by native_decide
  have hfl2 : (⌊(9 : ℝ) / 2⌋ : ℤ) = 4 := by native_decide
  have hceil1 : (⌈-Real.pi⌉ : ℤ) = -3 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
    constructor
    · linarith [Real.pi_lt_315]
    · linarith [Real.pi_gt_three]
  have hceil2 : (⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ : ℤ) = 8 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
    constructor
    · have : Real.sqrt 49 = 7 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]; ring
      have h49 : Real.sqrt 49 < Real.sqrt 50 := Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      linarith
    · have : Real.sqrt 64 = 8 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]; ring
      have h64 : Real.sqrt 50 < Real.sqrt 64 := Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      linarith
  simp only [hfl1, hfl2, hceil1, hceil2]
  norm_num

simp [Irrational]
  have h2 : f (-Real.pi) = 9 := by
    rw [h₁]
    · simp only [Int.ceil_neg]
      have : ⌊Real.pi⌋ = 3 := by native_decide
      rw [this]
      norm_num
    · exact irrational_neg_iff.mpr Real.irrational_pi
  have h3 : f (Real.sqrt 50) = 64 := by
    rw [h₁]
    · have : Int.ceil (Real.sqrt 50) = 8 := by native_decide
      rw [this]
      norm_num
    · have : (50 : ℝ) = 2 * 25 := by norm_num
      rw [this, Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]
      simp only [ne_eq]
      push_neg
      intro h
      have : Irrational (Real.sqrt 2 * 5) := by
        apply Irrational.mul_rat Real.irrational_sqrt_two
        norm_num
      rw [mul_comm] at this
      exact this h
  have h4 : f (9 / 2) = 4 := by
    rw [h₀]
    · native_decide
    · simp [Irrational]
  linarith

simp only [mul_comm]
      refine Irrational.mul_rat ?_ (by norm_num)
      exact irrational_sqrt_two
    · push_neg; intro h; nlinarith [Real.sq_sqrt (show (50 : ℝ) ≥ 0 by norm_num)]
  rw [h₀ _ hrat1, h₀ _ hrat2, h₁ _ hirr1, h₁ _ hirr2]
  rw [hcbrt]
  have hfl1 : ⌊(2 : ℝ)⌋ = 2 := by native_decide
  have hfl2 : ⌊(9 / 2 : ℝ)⌋ = 4 := by native_decide
  have hce1 : ⌈(-Real.pi : ℝ)⌉ = -3 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
    constructor
    · linarith [Real.pi_gt_three]
    · linarith [Real.pi_lt_315]
  have hce2 : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
    constructor
    · have : Real.sqrt 49 = 7 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> norm_num
      calc (7 : ℝ) = Real.sqrt 49 := this.symm
        _ < Real.sqrt 50 := Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
    · have : Real.sqrt 64 = 8 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> norm_num
      calc Real.sqrt 50 ≤ Real.sqrt 64 := Real.sqrt_le_sqrt (by norm_num)
        _ = 8 := this
  simp only [hfl1, hfl2, hce1, hce2]
  norm_num

simp only [sq]
      exact Irrational.mul_rat (Real.irrational_sqrt_two) (by norm_num)
    · exact Real.sqrt_nonneg 2
  rw [h₀ _ hrat1, h₀ _ hrat2, h₁ _ hirr1, h₁ _ hirr2, h2]
  have hfl1 : ⌊(2 : ℝ)⌋ = 2 := by native_decide
  have hfl2 : ⌊(9 / 2 : ℝ)⌋ = 4 := by native_decide
  have hcl1 : ⌈(-Real.pi : ℝ)⌉ = -3 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
    constructor
    · linarith [Real.pi_lt_315]
    · linarith [Real.pi_gt_three]
  have hcl2 : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
    constructor
    · have : Real.sqrt 49 = 7 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]; norm_num
      have h49 : Real.sqrt 49 < Real.sqrt 50 := Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      linarith
    · have : Real.sqrt 64 = 8 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]; norm_num
      have h64 : Real.sqrt 50 < Real.sqrt 64 := Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
      linarith
  simp [hfl1, hfl2, hcl1, hcl2]

simp only [hf1, hf2, hc1, hc2]
  norm_num

simp; exact Real.pi_pos.le
    · simp; exact Real.pi_lt_four
    · norm_num
  have hceilsqrt50 : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
    rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff]
    constructor
    · simp
      have : (7 : ℝ) ^ 2 < 50 := by norm_num
      exact Real.lt_sqrt (by norm_num) this
    · simp
      have : (50 : ℝ) ≤ 8 ^ 2 := by norm_num
      exact Real.sqrt_le_sqrt this |>.trans (by norm_num : Real.sqrt (8^2) ≤ 8)
    · norm_num
  rw [hfloor2, hfloor92, hceilpi, hceilsqrt50]
  norm_num

simp only [mul_pow]
      have : Real.sqrt 2 ^ 2 = 2 := Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)
      rw [this]
      norm_num
      exact irrational_sqrt_two
    · exact (Real.sqrt_pos.mpr (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) > 0)).le
  have h8 : (8 : ℝ) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) = 2 := by
    rw [← Real.rpow_natCast 2 3, ← Real.rpow_mul (by norm_num : (2 : ℝ) ≥ 0)]
    norm_num
  have hf8 : f (8 ^ (1 / 3)) = 2 := by
    rw [h8, h₀ 2 (by simp)]
    norm_num
  have hfpi : f (-Real.pi) = 9 := by
    rw [h₁ _ hpi]
    have : (-4 : ℝ) < -Real.pi ∧ -Real.pi < -3 := by
      constructor <;> linarith [Real.pi_gt_three, Real.pi_lt_four]
    have hceil : ⌈-Real.pi⌉ = -3 := by
      rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
      constructor <;> linarith [this.1, this.2]
    simp [hceil]
  have hfsqrt50 : f (Real.sqrt 50) = 64 := by
    rw [h₁ _ hsqrt50]
    have h1 : (7 : ℝ) < Real.sqrt 50 := by
      rw [Real.lt_sqrt (by norm_num) (by norm_num)]
      norm_num
    have h2 : Real.sqrt 50 < 8 := by
      rw [Real.sqrt_lt' (by norm_num)]
      norm_num
    have hceil : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
      rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff (by norm_num)]
      constructor <;> linarith
    simp [hceil]
  have hf92 : f (9 / 2) = 4 := by
    rw [h₀ (9/2) (by simp)]
    norm_num
  linarith

simp [Irrational]
  have h2 : f (-Real.pi) = 9 := by
    rw [h₁]
    · have : ⌈-Real.pi⌉ = -3 := by
        rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff]
        · constructor
          · linarith [Real.pi_gt_three]
          · linarith [Real.pi_lt_four]
        · norm_num
      simp [this]
    · exact irrational_neg.mpr Real.irrational_pi
  have h3 : f (Real.sqrt 50) = 64 := by
    rw [h₁]
    · have : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
        rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff]
        · constructor
          · simp only [Int.cast_ofNat, sub_nonneg]
            have : Real.sqrt 49 = 7 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> norm_num
            calc Real.sqrt 50 > Real.sqrt 49 := by apply Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt <;> norm_num
              _ = 7 := this
          · have : Real.sqrt 64 = 8 := by rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> norm_num
            calc Real.sqrt 50 < Real.sqrt 64 := by apply Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt <;> norm_num
              _ = 8 := this
        · norm_num
      simp [this]
    · have : Real.sqrt 50 = 5 * Real.sqrt 2 := by
        rw [show (50 : ℝ) = 25 * 2 by norm_num, Real.sqrt_mul (by norm_num : (25 : ℝ) ≥ 0)]
        simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq] <;> norm_num
      rw [this]
      exact Irrational.mul_rat (ne_of_gt (by norm_num)) irrational_sqrt_two
  have h4 : f (9 / 2) = 4 := by
    rw [h₀]
    · norm_num
    · simp [Irrational]
  linarith

simp [Irrational]
  have h2 : f (-Real.pi) = 9 := by
    rw [h₁]
    · have : ⌈-Real.pi⌉ = -3 := by
        rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff]
        · constructor
          · simp; exact Real.pi_gt_three
          · simp; linarith [Real.pi_lt_four]
        · norm_num
      simp [this]
    · exact irrational_neg.mpr Real.irrational_pi
  have h3 : f (Real.sqrt 50) = 64 := by
    rw [h₁]
    · have : ⌈Real.sqrt 50⌉ = 8 := by
        rw [Int.ceil_eq_iff]
        · constructor
          · simp
            have : Real.sqrt 49 < Real.sqrt 50 := by
              apply Real.sqrt_lt_sqrt
              · norm_num
              · norm_num
            simp at this
            linarith
          · have : Real.sqrt 50 ≤ Real.sqrt 64 := by
              apply Real.sqrt_le_sqrt
              norm_num
            simp at this
            linarith
        · norm_num
      simp [this]
    · have : Irrational (Real.sqrt 2) := Real.irrational_sqrt_two
      have h50 : Real.sqrt 50 = 5 * Real.sqrt 2 := by
        rw [show (50 : ℝ) = 25 * 2 by norm_num, Real.sqrt_mul (by norm_num : (25 : ℝ) ≥ 0)]
        simp [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]; norm_num
      rw [h50]
      exact Irrational.mul_rat (ne_of_gt (by norm_num : (5 : ℚ) > 0)) this
  have h4 : f (9 / 2) = 4 := by
    rw [h₀]
    · norm_num
    · simp [Irrational]
  linarith

simp only [hfloor1, hfloor2, hceil1, hceil2]
  norm_num
